subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God and daughter of His handmaid! Hearken with the ear of thy soul unto the divine call, for the outward ears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز خدا و فرزند کنیز او بشنو ندای الهی را بگوش جان چه که آذان ظاهره
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @prayer for morning, @praise and encouragement, @development of capacity and readiness
